identity_anchor: The Chinese characters '美团' (Meituan) and the signature yellow color tone.
brand_cues_to_preserve: The specific font structure of '美团'
The brand's yellow color identity (adapted to pastel)
semantic_cues_to_preserve: Service platform accessibility (implied by soft, friendly appearance)
design_rationale: Meituan's icon is purely typographic. To fit the 'Healing Hand-drawn' theme without losing instant recognition, the text must be preserved but physically transformed from sharp vector type into a soft, balloon-like or clay-like object. The strict constraint ensures users still recognize the app immediately despite the style shift. The吉祥物 (mascot) will interact with the text to break the static nature of a wordmark.
must_preserve: The legibility of the characters '美团'
The relative arrangement of the two characters
can_recompose: Transforming sharp serif/sans-serif strokes into rounded, hand-drawn thick lines
Changing solid yellow fill to a softer, creamy pastel yellow
Adding a black sketchy outline around the characters
Positioning the mascot (e.g., hugging the '团' character or sitting on top of '美')
forbid: Using the original sharp, geometric font
Using high-saturation standard Meituan yellow (must be pastel/cream)
Making the text too thin or delicate (must look chubby/soft)
generation_direction: A hand-drawn cartoon icon on a creamy yellow background. The subject is the Chinese text '美团' rendered as soft, puffy, 3D-like bubble letters in pastel yellow with a sketchy black outline. A cute white fluffy puppy is hugging the right side of the character '团' or resting its chin on the top stroke. Matte texture, healing style, no sharp edges.
